note: Per-category substitution fit rules - human-readable and editable, like the M3 knowledge file. must_match parameters must be equal after normalization; must_meet_or_exceed parameters must be numerically >= the reference. A parameter missing on EITHER side makes fit UNVERIFIED, never a silent pass. Categories with auto_substitution=false are policy gates: the engine refuses to auto-suggest and says why.

microcontroller.policy_reason: Microcontrollers embed firmware, pinout, and toolchain dependencies that no parametric comparison can verify. Substitution requires engineering review - the engine refuses to guess.

unclassified.policy_reason: Part category is unclassified - fit rules cannot be selected, so fitness cannot be verified. Classify the part first.
